康二: Health, ease, peace; comfort and well-being
閣: Tower, lofty building; cabinet (government); elevated structure
稲葉: Rice plant (growing in the field); paddy rice
浩二: Vast, wide, expansive (especially of water); abundant
簿: Register, ledger, account book; record-keeping document
准: Associate, quasi-, semi-; conform to, approve; used as a rank prefix
冠婚: Crown, coronet; cap; first place; to crown, surpass
麗子: Beautiful, lovely, graceful; elegant and refined appearance
淳一: Pure, sincere, honest; simple and genuine in character
桐蔭: Paulownia tree (kiri); a noble tree associated with the imperial family
敦子: Sincere, kind, cordial; warm-hearted; to be generous
祐子: Divine help, blessing, assistance; to aid or protect (by gods)
亮一: Bright, clear, luminous; intelligent; to illuminate or clarify
圭吾: Pointed jade tablet (ancient ritual object); jade; used in names for purity/nobility
睦み: Harmony, friendship, intimacy; to get along well; peaceful relations
曹操: Companion, fellow; class, group; official rank; trough (archaic)
漱石: To gargle, rinse the mouth; to wash with water (literary/archaic)
於く: At, in, from (literary/classical particle); used in formal/legal writing
孟録: First, eldest; the beginning of a season; used in classical names (Mencius)
渥美: Moist, wet; grace, favor; generous; rich (of color or liquid)
叡山: Wise, sagacious; imperial wisdom; used in reference to emperors
耶律: Question particle (classical); used to transcribe foreign sounds; father (archaic)
衿子: Collar, lapel of a garment; variant of 襟; used in names for elegance
云: To say, to speak (archaic/literary form); cloud (classical Chinese usage)
